common.whatsappBase: Hello, I'm interested in learning more about your dental services (RU)

form.dropCV: Drop your CV here or click to browse (RU)

hero.title: Partner With FeRa Clinic (RU)
hero.subtitle: Join our network of trusted partners and collaborate with a premium dental clinic in Istanbul. Together, we can provide exceptional dental care to international patients. (RU)

whoCanApply.title: Who Can Apply (RU)
whoCanApply.subtitle: We welcome applications from established professionals and organizations in the medical tourism and healthcare industry. (RU)

agencies.title: Medical Tourism Agencies (RU)
agencies.description: Established agencies coordinating international dental treatments and medical travel. (RU)

coordinators.title: Patient Coordinators (RU)
coordinators.description: Healthcare professionals who facilitate patient care and treatment planning. (RU)

consultants.title: Healthcare Consultants (RU)
consultants.description: Independent consultants providing guidance on dental tourism and treatment options. (RU)

influencers.title: Influencers & Creators (RU)
influencers.description: Content creators and influencers in healthcare, wellness, and dental tourism. (RU)

referrals.title: Referral Partners (RU)
referrals.description: International partners who refer patients for premium dental care services. (RU)

whyPartner.title: Why Partner With FeRa Clinic (RU)
whyPartner.subtitle: Discover the benefits of partnering with a premium dental clinic committed to excellence and patient satisfaction. (RU)

premium.title: Premium Dental Care (RU)
premium.description: Access to world-class dental treatments and state-of-the-art facilities in Istanbul. (RU)

support.title: International Patient Support (RU)
support.description: Comprehensive support for international patients including travel coordination and translation. (RU)

location.title: Strategic Istanbul Location (RU)
location.description: Premium location in Istanbul, bridging Europe and Asia for international patient access. (RU)

communication.title: Transparent Communication (RU)
communication.description: Clear, honest communication and regular updates throughout the treatment journey. (RU)

coordination.title: Personalized Coordination (RU)
coordination.description: Tailored treatment coordination and personalized care for each referred patient. (RU)

reputation.title: Trusted Reputation (RU)
reputation.description: Build your reputation by partnering with a trusted, premium dental clinic brand. (RU)

howItWorks.title: How It Works (RU)
howItWorks.subtitle: Our partnership process is designed to be transparent, efficient, and focused on building successful collaborations. (RU)

step1.title: Submit Partnership Request (RU)
step1.description: Complete our partnership application form with your details and collaboration interests. (RU)

step2.title: Our Team Reviews Your Profile (RU)
step2.description: Our partnership team carefully reviews your application and background for potential collaboration. (RU)

step3.title: We Contact You to Discuss Collaboration (RU)
step3.description: If there's a potential fit, we'll reach out to discuss partnership opportunities and next steps. (RU)

form.title: Partnership Application (RU)
form.subtitle: Ready to partner with us? Complete the form below and our partnership team will review your application. (RU)
form.companyNamePlaceholder: Enter your company or brand name (RU)
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your partnership proposal and collaboration interests... (RU)
form.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in partnering with FeRa Clinic. Our team will review your application and contact you within 3-5 business days. (RU)
